name: Amplify Shield
description: Hyperion amp shields spend part of their capacity to boost the damage of your next projectile while the shield is full. They favor deliberate gunplay, rewarding you for timing shots around recharge windows instead of staying in constant close-range fire.
notes:
They work best when you can keep your distance and let the shield refill before taking the next boosted shot.

Weapons that fire multiple projectiles, along with some version-specific quirks, can change how reliably the bonus applies and how much value you get from each trigger pull.

special.description: When the shield is full, your next projectile deals extra damage and consumes part of the shield.
